assertions.title: Corrupted or zero-byte PDF handled gracefully

steps.action: Upload zero-byte PDF (zero-byte.pdf) from drop screen
steps.expected: App shows clear error and stays/returns on drop screen
steps.observed: Alert shown: 'File is empty. Please select a valid PDF.' and drop screen remained visible

assertions.title: Default mode is Identity only and selection persists through file drop

steps.expected: Identity only is selected by default
steps.observed: Identity mode button had selected styling (non-white background) while Full redaction was unselected

steps.action: Switch to Full redaction and upload valid-mode-check.pdf
steps.expected: Selected mode persists after drop and detection uses full-redaction behavior
steps.observed: Preview opened with 'Full redact' active and sidebar showed 'Dollar amounts ×1' under Removing, confirming full-redaction behavior

steps.expected: Password modal appears with clear prompt and input field
steps.observed: Modal appeared with prompt 'This PDF is password-protected', explanatory text, password textbox, and Cancel/Unlock actions

frictions.description: File upload automation required targeting hidden input selector input[type='file'] (uploading to the visible 'browse your files' button fails because it is not an HTMLInputElement).
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser upload against input[type='file'] for all fixture uploads.
